title: NODE 022 — Service Station, Dusk, 1993

features.name: the forecourt canopy
features.desc-on-touch: The photograph was taken from across the road. You are standing inside the photograph now. The light is exactly the light. It has been dusk here for thirty-three years.

features.name: the pumps, sun-warmed
features.desc-on-touch: Warm the way a monitor is warm at the back. The price board shows a number that is also a year.

features.name: a rack of deliberately outdated maps
features.desc-on-touch: They bought maps that were already wrong on purpose, so the country could still surprise them. One is open to a town that the newer maps agree not to mention.

features.name: the payphone by the air hose
features.desc-on-touch: You still know the number. Your hand knows it. Somewhere forty kilometres away, a modem picks up on the third ring and says its one soft word.

inscription: Photo_ServiceStation_Dusk_NSW_1993.jpg → contains: this photograph. contains: the place you downloaded it from

file.name: Photo_ServiceStation_Dusk_NSW_1993.jpg
file.note: The photo has altered itself to include the place from which it was later downloaded. You appear in it, slightly.

exits.label: the line of casings back to the field
the motel sign, buzzing two letters short
the highway at the exact blue of a menu screen
